This is a FREE event. All Welcome!!

author: Austin Crawford
title: Full Moon Party at Southeast Lighthouse
summary: Enjoy the beauty and drama of a rising full moon from the grounds of Southeast Lighthouse at 8:21 pm. You can savor special Hors d’oeuvres and Refreshments in the glow of the full moon.
content:
Enjoy the beauty and drama of a rising full moon from the grounds of Southeast Lighthouse at 8:21 pm. You can savor special Hors d’oeuvres and Refreshments in the glow of the full moon.

At the event, you can place bids in our curated Silent Auction of artwork and antiques including a selection of original antique Block Island views and Block Island boats by the American Impressionist Reynolds Beal (1866-1951). These rare original works of art have been donated from a private collection to support the restoration of Southeast Lighthouse. Each is one-of-a-kind, specially matted and framed.

 

Preview Silent Auction items
address: South East Lighthouse Spring St New Shoreham

title: Summer Gala at Block Island Historical Society
summary: Our annual Summer Gala will be hosted on Saturday, August 24 from 6-9pm. Join us for drinks, dancing, hors d'oeuvres, and our legendary silent auction. Tickets are $125, available for purchase on our website or in the Museum Shop. See you there!
content:

It's NOT too late to get your tickets!

author: Austin Crawford
title: Pirate weekend Montauk Distillery Rum Pairing
summary: Ahoy Pirate! Get ready for an epic night of deliciousness on May 25th at Champlin's and Montauk Distillery's Rum Pairing! We're throwing a food and rum party like no other, and you're invited to join the fun. Our chefs are cooking up a storm, putting together not only a tasting menu, but a whole experience. Get ready to have your taste buds do a pirate dance! And because good food deserves great company, we've paired each dish with some awesome Rums. Our distillery expert will be on hand to spill the secrets on why each sip perfectly compliments the bites.
content: Ahoy Pirate! Get ready for an epic night of deliciousness on May 25th at Champlin's and Montauk Distillery's Rum Pairing! We're throwing a food and rum party like no other, and you're invited to join the fun. Our chefs are cooking up a storm, putting together not only a tasting menu, but a whole experience. Get ready to have your taste buds do a pirate dance! And because good food deserves great company, we've paired each dish with some awesome Rums. Our distillery expert will be on hand to spill the secrets on why each sip perfectly compliments the bites.

author: Austin Crawford
title: Zach Mccabe at Ballard's
summary: Experience the soulful sounds of Zach Mccabe at Ballard’s Beach Resort, straight from the heart of Nashville, Tennessee! With his captivating voice and heartfelt lyrics, Zach brings a touch of Southern charm and musical prowess to our shores. Join us for an unforgettable evening of live music as Zach serenades you with his original songs and classic covers. Don’t miss this chance to witness the talent of Zach Mccabe live at Ballard’s!

author: Austin Crawford
title: John Brazile at Ballard's
summary: Get ready for an unforgettable evening of live music with John Brazile at Ballard’s Beach Resort! Returning for his 13th year residency, John Brazile brings the vibrant energy of Nashville straight to Block Island.
